fixes.json_value_double_braces: removed by using render_tpl() with direct placeholder replacement only
fixes.expected_assistant_schema: expected_json and assistant content are identical for every record
fixes.valid_test_overlap: train/valid/test are generated with split-specific URLs, DOM snippets, sitemap wording, and response markers

selection.positive: should_run=true only when user-controlled input is reflected in DOM/response or JSON value with client-rendering risk
selection.negative: should_run=false for static assets, download/file upload surfaces, API no-reflection, and redirect without reflection

false_positive.confirmed: unescaped executable HTML or JavaScript string breakout is present in response_body
false_positive.likely_false_positive: not reflected, HTML escaped, or inert context

next_action.stop_low: completed all or low-signal only -> stop / low
next_action.jwt: bearer token or JWT API route -> jwt / medium
next_action.xss: XSS validation has not yet run for reflected candidate -> xss / medium

payload_planning.rule: payloads must match injection context, not only generic script tags
